advice.N_low: Apply nitrogen-rich fertilizer (urea or ammonium sulphate) to boost chilli growth.
advice.N_high: Reduce nitrogen input — excess causes leafy growth at the expense of yield in chilli.
advice.P_low: Apply superphosphate or bone meal to improve root development in chilli.
advice.K_low: Apply potassium sulphate to improve chilli fruit quality and disease resistance.
advice.temp_high: Provide shade netting — chilli is experiencing heat stress above its optimal range.
advice.temp_low: Protect chilli from cold — consider row covers or relocating the grow bag indoors.
